title: Apothecary Jars with Lids Set of 3 - Home Essentials & Beyond Candy Jars for Candy Buffet, Glass décor, Laundry Room, Potpourri, and Bathroom Small Jars
description:
About this item
Glass
Imported
Set includes: Three (3) Clear glass Apothecary Jars. Measuring: Taller jar is 10" the two shorter ones are 8" in height and 4.5" in width.l Making them perfect for candy buffet display. Being a great home decor Accent by Filling with flowers shells and potpourri! Can be kept in a bathroom for holding anything from cotton balls to bath salts or soaps.
Beautiful Shape: These footed classic style apothecary jars are made from clear glass and are perfect for every setting from bathroom and kitchen storage, to home and venue decoration, garden floral and terrarium displays, and more. They feature a separate clear glass lid with a round handle for comfortability.
IDEAL GIFT OPTION - Easter, Thanksgiving, Christmas, housewarming or to shower your beloved with a wedding present. The elegant shape and lightweight design is guaranteed to impress your guest.
GUARANTEED: If for some reason the glass jars are broken during transportation, please contact us and we will provide you with a replacement at the first time.
Home Essentials Terra Collection Assorted Footed Glass Canisters With Lids (Set of 3), Small- 4.37Wx8.37"H Medium- 4.5Wx8.37H Large- 4.3Wx10.5"H
reviews_5s:
These little glass containers are so pretty. I have used for several different things over the years. Good quality and would make a great gift.Glass jars are really cute, they're just a little smaller than I thought but still worked great.Used these and a few other apothecary type containers for a candy table for my daughter's baby shower. So perfect! Colors were blue, green & yellow. Filled with blue m&ms lemon heads, green jellybeans... each jar with a single colored candy.
Awesome quality, weight, look & price.Love the look. Perfect for a hot cocoa station. Well-packed for safe shipping. Glass was thicker than expected. Nice.I love this jars!!! I used them for candy tables and they are a perfect size. Feels like good materialThese were glass as described and arrived unbroken!! The were however, a bit smaller than what I expected for the amount of money I paid for them. My momma was thrilled so I guess that's all that matters.Filled with an asortment of candy for my occasional used bar. Would make cute crafters organizers too.
I bought two different sets from different sellers not realizing one set was plastic . I can't tell the differance until I touch them. A glass lid slid out of my hands to the floor. I expected a mess of glass but happily it didn't break and not even a chip. Nice. Easy to clean too. I wash them by hand.These are so cute! If you've looked at apothecary jars much you probably know that these are a great deal. Personally, I was concerned that that might translate to a funky product but that was not at all the case. They are a very useful size (though not huge), are quite lovely and have no notable flaws (no seams or awkward shapes or poor fits). They look pretty much exactly like the picture (if anything a bit better in person) and came well packaged for the safety of the jars. The glass is a little thinner than some jars of this type which works just fine for me and makes them nice and light but if you are going for the heavy/ thick glass style that is not these.
Also, I had a small problem with my order (an issue with a missing lid) and the seller was excellent about it. They were kind, quick and fixed my problem at no hassle to me.
I'm not just delighted by the product but also really pleased with the customer service. Great job all around!I unfortunately broke one but the other 2 I filled with bath bombs and bath salts. Look great by the bathtub . Really gives the bathroom a fancy lookI was Leary of ordering these due to some of the reviews but am so happy that I did! They are perfect for our master bathroom. They arrived well protected and encased in styrofoam inside of a snug fitting box. The glass is on the thinner side but overall sturdy for what I’m using them for. They are hand wash only and we’re easy to clean. I absolutely love them and highly recommend them 🤩
reviews_1s: I was very displeased with this purchase! I do not know if this product was supposed to be glass or a super fragile plastic. I just know it was never worth the price. As soon as I opened the box I noticed one of the containers were already broken! I said no big deal because I assumed it may have been that someone tossed the box not knowing it had containers inside. As I took the other containers out of the box, one of the tops lightly dropped on the table I was working on and it cracked down the sides, I have many glass products and none ever broke so quick. I couldn't finish storing the other two because when I was putting one away in the box it cracked with just a little pressure so I gave the last one to my neighbor. A nice tap on the container with your nail will let u hear a cheap sound coming from it. The containers easily get clouded and just look super cheap. This was a horrible purchase!The outside box corner was just a little damage. I didn't think the jars would be this heavily damaged. The quality of glass is very poor. Not clear, gives like a hazy or dark color to jars. Would have bee nice size for beach sand and shell display or candy.One of three broken.Definitely not want expected. More like drinking glass. Don’t waste money purchasingToo small to do anything with bad, bad badIt was very small I was expecting it to be a lot bigger .Terrible quality. My sisters and I each ordered one of these so we'd have nine jars for a candy table at various events. The first party that we used them for, they literally broke in my sister's hand. All she did was pick them up to put them back in the box and they broke right in her hand. Extremely dangerous. We still have one more family party we wanted to use Jen for and at this point I think we are down to five jars out of the nine we had ordered. And not all of those have tops either. Extremely disappointed.I was so happy to receive it but once I opened the box I couldn't look at them anymore. TBH they were so tiny and I thought they were going to be big but it was just a waste of money and time. It was the size of a tea cup. And the lids were to big they couldn't fit.One of the jars came already broken. SadComplete trash! I ordered two sets, and they were really cute. Until I actually used them and they started to break. I was cleaning one and it broke in my hand. Luckily it didn't cut me. I filled two up with candy and they both broke. I had to throw the jars and all the candy away. I didn't even bother to keep the other jars. I had to throw them all away! Waste of money.
